role: Source code directory containing all modules of the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively implements the complete ArchSpine mirror system: from configuration and AST analysis to CLI commands, service orchestration, pipeline tasks, infrastructure support, type definitions, and utility functions.

children.role: This directory contains all template definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system, including foundational documentation, AI prompt schemas, architectural rules, and view inventories.
Core module for AST-based code extraction, language discovery, and language configuration in the ArchSpine mirror system.
Entry point and user-facing interface for all command-line operations in the ArchSpine system.
Core runtime infrastructure providing configuration validation, error definitions, pipeline orchestration, and task execution state management for the ArchSpine system.
Core engine directory providing services for scanning, aggregation, rule enforcement, context analysis, violation fixing, and reporting.
Infrastructure layer providing core services for configuration management, LLM integration, persistence, credentials, and prompt generation for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Service orchestration layer that coordinates and manages the core analysis, fix, synchronization, LLM configuration, and view generation pipelines for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Pipeline stage tasks that implement specific processing steps in the ArchSpine execution graph.
Core data types and type contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Utility modules providing file sync, fingerprinting, CLI UI, and infrastructure support for ArchSpine.
